mapper.insert: insert into coupon(name, coupon_type, publish_type, store_id, receive_type, threshold_amount, discount_amount, discount_rate, total_count, receive_count, used_count, per_user_limit, start_time, end_time, status, remark, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{couponType}, #{publishType}, #{storeId}, #{receiveType}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountRate}, #{totalCount}, #{receiveCount}, #{usedCount}, #{perUserLimit}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select c.*, s.name as store_name from coupon c left join store s on c.store_id = s.id where c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update coupon set status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update coupon set receive_count = receive_count + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{couponId} and status = 1 and receive_count < total_count
update coupon set used_count = used_count + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{couponId}
mapper.select: select c.*, s.name as store_name from coupon c left join store s on c.store_id = s.id where c.status = 1 and c.receive_count < c.total_count and c.start_time <= #{now} and c.end_time >= #{now} and (c.publish_type = 1 or (c.publish_type = 2 and c.store_id = #{storeId})) and (c.receive_type = 1 or (c.receive_type = 2 and #{isMember} = 1)) order by c.publish_type asc, c.id desc
